title: bassia scoparia var. subvillosa
intro: Bassia scoparia var. subvillosa, also known as Mexican feathergrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Bassia scoparia var. subvillosa can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
